challenges.title: The ML Landscape
challenges.description: Explore the fundamentals of Machine Learning: definitions, types of learning, batch vs online learning, and key challenges.

challenges.title: End-to-End ML Project
challenges.description: Learn the complete ML workflow: framing problems, data preparation, feature engineering, and Scikit-Learn fundamentals.

challenges.title: Classification
challenges.description: Master classification techniques: confusion matrix, precision, recall, F1 score, ROC curves, multiclass and multilabel classification.

challenges.title: Training Models
challenges.description: Deep dive into model training: Gradient Descent, Polynomial Regression, Learning Curves, Regularization, Logistic and Softmax Regression.

challenges.title: Support Vector Machines
challenges.description: Master SVM: large margin classification, soft margin, kernels (polynomial, RBF), SVM regression, and practical usage.

challenges.title: Decision Trees
challenges.description: Master Decision Trees: CART algorithm, Gini and Entropy, pruning, regularization hyperparameters, and regression trees.

challenges.title: Ensemble Learning and Random Forests
challenges.description: Master ensemble methods: Voting, Bagging, Boosting, Random Forests, AdaBoost, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost, and Stacking.

challenges.title: Dimensionality Reduction
challenges.description: Master dimensionality reduction: PCA, Kernel PCA, t-SNE, LLE, MDS, Isomap, and the Curse of Dimensionality.
